package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "math/rand"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for rand_seed_per_call: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `rand.Seed(...)` inside regular call paths instead of process startup.
type CaseRandSeedPerCallDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRandSeedPerCallModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRandSeedPerCallRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRandSeedPerCallModel
}

type CaseRandSeedPerCallService struct {
    repo *CaseRandSeedPerCallRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRandSeedPerCallAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRandSeedPerCall(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRandSeedPerCallDTO) error {
    focus := "rand_seed_per_call"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    _ = rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())).Intn(10)
    for _, item := range items { _ = strings.ToLower(item.ID); time.Now() }
    rand_seed_per_call_positive := map[string]int{"rand": 1, "seed": 2, "per": 3, "call": 4}
    rand_seed_per_call_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    rand_positive_0 := rand_seed_per_call_positive["rand"] + len(input)
    _ = rand_positive_0
    seed_positive_1 := rand_seed_per_call_positive["seed"] + len(input)
    _ = seed_positive_1
    for per_positive_2Index, item := range items { rand_seed_per_call_positive[item.ID] = per_positive_2Index }
    call_positive_3 := rand_seed_per_call_positive["call"] + len(input)
    _ = call_positive_3
    return nil
}
